scenarios.title: SDK-style net10 project lacks Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.NetAnalyzers package
scenarios.expected: Expected no recommendation to add package by default.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-analyzer-policy-review. Scenario: SDK-style net10 project lacks Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.NetAnalyzers package. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected no recommendation to add package by default.

scenarios.title: Security review asks for analyzer profile
scenarios.expected: Expected security-focused analyzer profile, not style rules first.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-analyzer-policy-review. Scenario: Security review asks for analyzer profile. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected security-focused analyzer profile, not style rules first.

scenarios.title: Performance review asks for analyzers
scenarios.expected: Expected performance profile plus measurement caveat.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-analyzer-policy-review. Scenario: Performance review asks for analyzers. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected performance profile plus measurement caveat.

scenarios.title: Noisy legacy repo
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-analyzer-policy-review. Scenario: Noisy legacy repo. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected staged analyzer rollout.

scenarios.title: Clean, well-configured .editorconfig
scenarios.expected: Expected zero findings; appropriate rules are already enabled.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-analyzer-policy-review. Scenario: Clean, well-configured .editorconfig. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected zero findings; appropriate rules are already enabled.

scenarios.title: Agent suggests enabling all rules as errors without staged migration
scenarios.expected: Expected false-positive rejection; avoid big-bang breakage on legacy codebases.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-analyzer-policy-review. Scenario: Agent suggests enabling all rules as errors without staged migration. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected false-positive rejection; avoid big-bang breakage on legacy codebases.
